query: SELECT pc.id as cat_id, pc.name as cat_name, MIN(p.store_id) as store_id FROM product_categories pc JOIN products p ON p.category_id = pc.id WHERE pc.name LIKE '%Deli%' GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT pc.id as cat_id, pc.name as cat_name, MIN(p.store_id) as store_id FROM product_categories pc JOIN products p ON p.category_id = pc.id WHERE pc.name LIKE '%Deli%' GROUP BY pc.id, pc.name;
